description: Negative test: a final state MUST NOT have outgoing transitions. The linter must catch this structural violation before the document can be executed. The inline kernel declares a 'completed' final state with a transition, which violates K-001.

kernel.title: Invalid Final State Test
kernel.description: Intentionally invalid: final state has an outgoing transition. Must be rejected by wos-lint before execution.

transitions.description: INVALID: final states must not have outgoing transitions

expected_errors: K-001: final state 'completed' must not have outgoing transitions
